description_long: This object consists of six brown glass beer bottles arranged in a row, each featuring a distinct, colorful label with illustrated characters and unique graphic designs. The bottles have a classic long-neck shape with a narrow neck and wider body, topped with metallic crown caps. The front labels are vibrant, each with different color schemes and artistic illustrations, while the back labels contain product information in smaller text. The glass is translucent, revealing the amber liquid inside. The bottles are clean and free of condensation, and the overall presentation is neat and visually appealing.
description: A set of six brown glass beer bottles, each with a unique, colorful illustrated label and metallic crown caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six bottles with their distinct, colorful illustrated labels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the bottles aligned in a row, with the edge of the labels and the metallic caps visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back labels with product information and the brown glass bodies of the bottles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottles in a line, with the edge of the labels and caps visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The labels feature colorful, illustrated characters and bold, playful typography, with each bottle having a unique color palette and artistic style. The designs are eye-catching and modern, combining cartoon-like imagery with clear, readable text.
